functions.title: Guide Book #52
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #52§r
§lWood Corpse§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Treant, Nature-elemental, Magical, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: Corrupted Forest.
•§lHealth§r: 28
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25

•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lPossible drops§r: Corrupted Oak Log, Corrupted Oak Sapling, Stick, Bone, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 7-8

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Corpse Wood is a twisted, hostile treant that haunts the depths of the Corrupted Forest. Once a guardian of nature, it now roams in decay, striking intruders with powerful, root-like limbs. With a gnarled body and eerie presence,
it attacks players, golems, and tamed beasts alike. Its remains yield corrupted wood, bones, and other grim tokens of the forest’s curse—a reminder that even nature can rot and rise again.§’
